ham.subject: Transaction Alert: ₹5,000 Debit from Your Account
ham.body:
Dear Customer,

We have detected a debit of ₹5,000 from your bank account on 07/04/2026 at 14:32 IST. The transaction was made to “FreshMart Online” from the debit card ending in 1234.

If you recognize this purchase, no further action is required. If you do not recognize this transaction, please contact our 24/7 support team immediately using the secure link below:
<URL>

Thank you for banking with us.

Regards,
Customer Support Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Your Crypto Wallet is Suspended – Verify Now
spam.body:
Hello,

This is to inform you that your crypto wallet (ID: 0xA1B2C3D4E5F6) has been temporarily suspended due to suspicious activity. If you do not act within 24 hours, your funds will be permanently locked.

Please verify your identity by clicking the secure link below:
<URL>

Thank you for your immediate attention.

Best,
Support Team
